text.title: AI Research Tools Selection Map Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: classify-question
step.action: Classify evidence_type from {market_data, scientific_claim, opinion, summary, meta_analysis}.

step.name: pick-tool
step.action: Apply the evidence_type → tool mapping; record tool_choice + alternatives_considered.

step.name: run-query
step.action: Run query with required filters (recency for market data); save raw answer + sources.
step.decision-gate: If <2 citations returned, retry with reformulated query.

step.name: verify-citations
step.action: Open each cited URL/DOI; confirm the claim appears verbatim or paraphrased.

step.name: emit-decision-record
step.action: Write decision-record matching schema; commit to research repo.
